meterRecvPort.description: Local UDP port the WING sends meter data to

streamingMainIndex.description: Which Main bus (1..4) carries the streaming mix; used for game on-air detection

thresholdDb.description: Mic level (dBFS) at or above which a channel counts as active

hysteresisDb.description: dB the mic level must drop below threshold before turning off

holdMs.description: Keep mic ON for at least this many ms after the last over-threshold sample

mainSendThresholdDb.description: Streaming Main send/fader level (dB) above which a game channel counts as on-air
